name: FRANKLIN ELECTRIC CO INC
business: Franklin Electric designs, manufactures and distributes water and fuel pumping systems, including submersible motors, pumps, electronic controls, water treatment systems, and related parts and equipment. The company's products serve residential, agricultural, municipal, and industrial end markets, as well as gas stations and other energy applications. It also sells groundwater equipment products to well installation contractors through its distribution branches.

exposures.sentence: The segment serves other energy markets such as power reliability systems and includes intelligent electronic devices that are designed for online monitoring for the power utility, hydroelectric, rail, and telecommunication and data center infrastructure.

In 2025, the Company acquired PumpEng Pty Ltd ("PumpEng"), a manufacturer of submersible pumps for the mining sector headquartered in Australia
The energy and mining industries are users of the Company’s products, including the coal, iron ore, gold, copper, oil, and natural gas industries.
Energy Systems is a global leader in the production and marketing of fuel pumping systems, fuel containment systems and monitoring and control systems.
Water Systems motors, pumps and controls are used principally for pumping clean water and wastewater in a variety of residential, agricultural, municipal and industrial applications.
